title: Measurement
description: A phasepost measurement: a span (an observation, or a candidate scoring its own source) scored against all 27 phasepost cells by eo-lexical-analysis-2.0, in the space of one exemplar basis. Structurally shared by observation.measured and exemplar.candidate.scored (SPEC.md §4.4, §5.2) — no phasepost claim anywhere in the system may skip this shape or report fewer than 27 cells (SPEC.md invariant 5).

ppmInteger.description: Parts-per-million scaled integer in [-1000000, 1000000]. No floats anywhere in payload (SPEC.md §4.1, invariant 4) — a similarity of 0.5 is carried as 500000.

phasepostCellKey.description: One of the 27 OP_Stance_Site cell keys. Must match a key in data/phasepost-cells.json exactly; that file, not this enum, is the source of truth if the two ever drift.

phasepostCellMeasurement.description: One cell's raw measurement. Never collapsed to argmax or omitted for scoring near zero (invariant 5: '27 values, not just the winner') — a cell the span resembles not at all is still reported, as zero.

similarity_ppm.description: Raw cosine similarity between the span's embedding and this cell's centroid vector, scaled to ppm.

amplitude_ppm.description: This cell's share of total_supported_amplitude after normalization across all 27 cells (non-negative; similarity_ppm may be negative, amplitude_ppm never is).

phasepostMeasurements.description: All 27 cells, always present, keyed by phasepostCellKey. A projection mixing measurements computed under two different embedding models/basis identities without declaring both lenses is invalid (invariant 11).

entropy_microunits.description: Shannon entropy of the normalized 27-cell distribution, in micro-units (natural-log nats * 1e6), so a flat/uncommitted measurement and a sharply-peaked one are distinguishable at a glance.

total_supported_amplitude.description: ppm-scaled sum of amplitude actually supported by measurable centroids (see src/compress.js) — less than 1000000 when some cells could not be scored.

measurement_protocol.description: Named, versioned algorithm, e.g. eo-compression@1.0.0 (src/compress.js MEASUREMENT_PROTOCOL constant).
